title: Multi-Factor Authentication
description: Implement MFA with SMS OTP, authenticator app, and biometric (mobile) as second factors. MFA required for all logins.
acceptanceCriteria:
- SMS OTP delivery within 30 seconds
- TOTP authenticator app setup with QR code
- Biometric login on iOS (Face ID/Touch ID) and Android
- Fallback to SMS if biometric unavailable

title: Session & Access Management
description: JWT-based session management with configurable timeouts, concurrent device limits, role-based access, and account lockout protection.
acceptanceCriteria:
- 15-minute sliding session expiration
- Max 3 concurrent sessions
- Force logout from profile page invalidates all tokens
- Progressive lockout after 3/5/10 failed attempts
- Account unlock via email link after 30 minutes

title: Security Hardening
description: Implement OWASP-compliant security headers, rate limiting, CSRF protection, and comprehensive audit logging for all authentication events.
acceptanceCriteria:
- CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options headers
- Rate limiting: 10 login attempts per minute per IP
- All auth events logged with timestamp, IP, user agent, outcome
- Audit logs are append-only and retained 7 years

title: Account Overview
description: Display all customer accounts with current balances, account status, and pending transaction indicators on the main dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Show all account types: Checking, Savings, Money Market, CD
- Display available and ledger balance
- Account status badge (Active, Frozen, Closed)
- Pending transactions shown with visual indicator

title: Transaction History
description: Searchable transaction history with filtering, pagination, and export (CSV/PDF) capabilities spanning up to 18 months.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Default view: last 30 days
- Filters: date range, amount range, keyword, transaction type
- Pagination with 25/50/100 per page options
- Export produces valid CSV and well-formatted PDF
- Search returns results within 500ms

title: Internal Transfers
description: Enable fund transfers between customer's own accounts (real-time) and to other Contoso customers (with limits and processing windows).
acceptanceCriteria:
- Own-account transfers: real-time, no daily limit
- Contoso customer transfers: $5K daily / $2.5K per-tx limits
- Business hours (6AM-9PM ET): real-time; otherwise: next business day
- Transfer confirmation screen with summary before submission

title: Payee Management
description: CRUD operations for saved payees with fraud prevention (24-hour hold on new payees).
acceptanceCriteria:
- Add payee: name, account number, routing number
- Edit and delete saved payees
- 24-hour hold on first transfer to newly added payee
- Payee list searchable and sortable

title: Transfer Safety
description: Step-up authentication for high-value transfers, fraud velocity checks, and transfer confirmation/receipt generation.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Re-auth (MFA) triggered for transfers > $500
- Velocity check: block if > 5 transfers in 10 minutes
- Confirmation receipt sent via email
- Receipt includes: timestamp, amount, from/to accounts, confirmation number

title: Transfer History
description: Dedicated transfer history view with search and filter capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Separate view for transfer history
- Filters: date, amount, recipient, status
- Status values: Completed, Pending, Cancelled, Failed
- Downloadable as CSV

title: Biller Management
description: Search billers from directory and manual biller entry for bill pay setup.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Biller directory search with typeahead (< 300ms)
- Manual entry form with validation
- Saved billers list with edit/delete
- Biller details: name, address, account number

title: Payment Processing
description: One-time bill payment submission with scheduling and payment history tracking.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Schedule payments up to 365 days ahead
- Cut-off: 4 PM ET for same-day
- Processing: 1-3 days (electronic), 5-7 days (check)
- Payment history with status tracking

title: Recurring Payments
description: Set up, manage (edit/pause/cancel), and receive reminders for recurring bill payments.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Frequencies: weekly, bi-weekly, monthly, quarterly
- Edit: amount, frequency, next date
- Pause with resume date
- Cancel with confirmation
- 3-day reminder email before each payment

title: Customer Support Portal
description: Customer-facing ticket system with submission, tracking, commenting, reopen capability, and SLA visibility.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Submit with: category, subject, description, attachments (3 files, 10MB each)
- Track status: Submitted → In Review → Awaiting Customer → Resolved → Closed
- Add comments to open tickets
- Reopen resolved tickets within 7 days
- SLA displayed per category

title: File Upload Engine
description: Secure file upload with client/server validation, virus scanning, and supported format enforcement.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Drag & drop + file browser upload
- Client-side: file type and size validation
- Server-side: MIME type verification + virus scan
- Allowed: PDF, JPG, PNG, TIFF; Max: 25 MB/file, 100 MB/request
- Infected files blocked with clear error message

title: Document Workflow
description: Document request workflow (back-office initiated), status tracking, and 7-year document retention with customer view access.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Back-office requests show: type, reason, deadline
- Customer uploads against specific request
- Status: Requested → Uploaded → Under Review → Accepted/Rejected
- 7-year retention; customer can view, not delete

title: Notification Delivery
description: Email and in-app notification infrastructure with mandatory security notifications.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Email via template engine + provider (SendGrid/SES)
- In-app: real-time updates, read/unread, badge count
- Mandatory notifications always delivered (no opt-out)
- Delivery confirmation logging

title: Notification Preferences
description: Customer-configurable notification preferences with per-category, per-channel settings and notification history.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Preference matrix: category × channel (email/in-app)
- Mandatory notifications locked (shown as non-toggleable)
- Customizable thresholds for transaction/balance alerts
- Notification history with timestamps and delivery status
